fields.head: EDZ_Rep_podania
fields.body:
Dobry den 

Obsahom tohto emailu je automaticky vygenerovany report v prilohe. 

Pripadne nastavenie spustenia reportu: https://emstools.example.sk/edz/reports_View  

Prosim o kontrolu reportu na sharepointe: https://example.sharepoint.com/teams/example-team/Zkazncke%20podania/Forms/AllItems.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2Fcoo%2Dbdpcp%2FZkazncke%20podania%2FREPORT%20%2D%20po%C4%8Det%20podan%C3%AD%20EDZ%20na%20KM&p=true&ct=1724406406643&or=OWA%2DNT%2DMail&cid=ee882d67%2D13f3%2D9ddc%2Df1c8%2De5447728226e&ga=1
